title: MongoDB User Group / MongoDB and AI
description: AI + MongoDB in Practice — Zürich Meetup Announcement. The MongoDB User Group Zürich is back with an exciting session where we’ll explore how to use an AI framework to integrate MongoDB into modern software projects. Discover practical approaches, learn from real-world insights, and connect with fellow developers.

title: MongoDB User Group / MongoDB and AI
description: During this session, Staff Developer Advocate Richmond Alake explored the transformative impact of AI agents and agentic systems, providing invaluable insights into constructing AI Agents powered by LLMs, developing agentic systems for complex workflows, and interacting with databases.
summary: We had an amazing time exploring AI agents. The insights into building LLM-powered applications using MongoDB were incredibly valuable.

title: MongoDB Day 2025
description: The annual gathering of MongoDB enthusiasts.
summary: It was a blast! We had over 500 attendees.
